subcodes.first_line: The fragrant and sweet-scented breeze wafting from the Abhá Paradise passeth over thy luminous resting-place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: النفحه المعطره و الرائحه المعنبره الساطعه من جنه الابهی تمر علی جدثک المنور
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @visitation Tablets
